description_long: This object represents an elderly person, depicted with a slightly hunched posture and a slender build. The figure is draped in a long, dark garment that appears to be a coat or cloak, with the fabric falling in loose folds and extending nearly to the ground. The clothing is predominantly dark brown and black, with no visible patterns or accessories. The person's head is not clearly visible, and there are no discernible facial features or hair details from any angle. The overall silhouette is elongated and narrow, with the arms and legs mostly obscured by the garment. The figure gives the impression of a reserved, elderly individual, possibly walking or standing still.
description: A slender elderly person in a long, dark, loose-fitting coat, with a slightly hunched posture and minimal visible details.
description_view_0: The view shows the upper body and shoulder area, highlighting the draped, dark garment and the angular fold of the coat.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the length and flow of the coat, with the lower edge and side profile of the figure visible.
description_view_2: A narrow, almost edge-on view, showing the thinness of the figure and the vertical drop of the garment.
description_view_3: Another angled view of the lower body, focusing on the draped fabric and the way it envelops the figure.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, loose-fitting dark coat or cloak with no visible patterns or accessories; overall casual and practical.
